title: Handle and move mushroom boxes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle and move mushroom boxes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Distribute boxes for filling to picking rooms

pcs.text: Select, assemble and position materials, trolleys, tools and equipment appropriate for handling and moving mushroom boxes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, assemble and position materials, trolleys, tools and equipment appropriate for handling and moving mushroom boxes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, assemble and position materials, trolleys, tools and equipment appropriate for handling and moving mushroom boxes.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on trolleys, tools and equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on trolleys, tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Follow site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Distribute empty boxes to pickers in a timely and efficient manner

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distribute empty boxes to pickers in a timely and efficient manner.

elements.title: Collect and move filled boxes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stack filled boxes on trolleys to the recommended height.

pcs.text: Move stacked trolleys safely from picking rooms and with consideration for other traffic flow in the area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move stacked trolleys safely from picking rooms and with consideration for other traffic flow in the area.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer and stack filled boxes into cool room using safe work practices.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record cool room air and mushroom pulp temperatures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record cool room air and mushroom pulp temperatures.

pcs.text: Report variations of temperature and anomalies, and take remedial action according to supervisor instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report variations of temperature and anomalies, and take remedial action according to supervisor instructions.
